expected_output.summary: Customer asks about support hours.

input: I can't tell if this is a billing or technical problem: my invoice won't load.

expected_output.summary: Invoice loading issue, could be billing or technical.

input: Just wanted to say thanks!

expected_output.summary: Customer expresses gratitude.

expected_output.summary: User cannot log in and is frustrated with support.

expected_output.summary: Customer questions high bill for short usage.

input: I can't log in, and your support is useless! Also, why is my bill so high? I only used the service for a day! The app is so buggy, it crashes every time I try to upload a file.

expected_output.summary: User cannot log in, frustrated with support, questions high bill, and reports app crashes during file upload.

input: The app is so buggy, it crashes every time I try to log in.

expected_output.summary: App crashes during login, user describes it as buggy.

input: I was charged $100 instead of $10. Is this a joke? Also, the app is so buggy, it crashes every time I try to upload a file.

expected_output.summary: Customer reports incorrect billing amount, possibly sarcastic, and also reports app crashes during file upload.

notes: Multiple issues with a sarcastic tone.

input: How do I delete my account? I want all my data removed.

expected_output.summary: User requests account deletion and data removal.

input: URGENT: My payment was declined but I have money on my card!!!

expected_output.summary: User reports payment declined despite having funds, urgent tone.

input: Can you add dark mode to the app? It hurts my eyes at night.

expected_output.summary: User requests dark mode feature for eye comfort.

input: I think I got a phishing email pretending to be from you. Here's a screenshot.

expected_output.summary: User reports potential phishing attempt impersonating the company.

input: No me deja iniciar sesión, necesito ayuda por favor.

expected_output.summary: User cannot log in, requests help in Spanish.

input: I've been waiting for 3 days for a response. This is unacceptable.

expected_output.summary: User complains about slow support response time.

input: pls fix thx

expected_output.summary: Very short request to fix an unspecified issue with thanks.

input: I need my invoice for last month for tax purposes. Can you email it to me?

expected_output.summary: User requests previous month's invoice for tax purposes.

input: Your app just deleted all my work. I'm furious right now.

expected_output.summary: User reports data loss in app, expresses anger.

input: Kann mich nicht anmelden. Hilfe bitte!

expected_output.summary: User cannot log in, requests help in German.

input: I'm not sure if this is the right place, but I have a question about your privacy policy.

expected_output.summary: User has question about privacy policy, hesitant tone.

input: Can I upgrade my plan mid-month? How does prorating work?

expected_output.summary: User asks about mid-month plan upgrade and prorating.

input: I forgot my password and the reset email never arrives. Checked spam already.

expected_output.summary: User cannot reset password because reset email is not received.

input: Seriously? Another crash? I'm so tired of this garbage app.

expected_output.summary: User reports recurring crash with very frustrated, insulting tone.

input: Hello, I hope you're having a good day. When you have a moment, could you please help me understand why I was charged twice? Thank you so much!

expected_output.summary: Very polite user asks about double charge.

input: 2FA not working. I'm locked out.

expected_output.summary: User reports two-factor authentication failure and lockout.

input: I'd like to request a refund for the last 3 months. I haven't used the service at all.

expected_output.summary: User requests refund for 3 months of unused service.

input: Does your app support exporting data to CSV? I need it for work.

expected_output.summary: User asks about CSV export feature for work purposes.

input: I'm receiving someone else's emails. I think accounts are mixed up.

expected_output.summary: User reports receiving another person's emails, potential account cross-contamination.

input: omg it finally worked after 10 tries lol nevermind

expected_output.summary: User reports issue resolved after multiple attempts, casual tone.

input: This is the 5th time I'm contacting you about the same bug. Will anyone ever fix it?

expected_output.summary: User reports recurring bug after multiple support contacts, expressing exasperation.

input: I want to upgrade to premium but I'm scared because of all the bugs. What do you recommend?

expected_output.summary: User hesitant to upgrade due to reported bugs, asks for recommendation.

notes: Sales hesitation due to technical concerns.
